title: Desktop Companion
subtitle: Your desktop companion is quietly learning to understand you better. All data stays local and collection is fully opt-in.

skills.hint: Skills your companion distilled from your repeated actions — view, edit, review.
skills.empty: No skills yet. Keep using the platform and your companion will learn.
skills.learnedToast: Your companion learned a new skill
skills.teachHint: After completing a multi-step task in a work session, paste its conversation ID here and I'll draft a skill from it (goes to review).
skills.taughtOk: Drafted a skill from your demonstration — check Pending
skills.taughtNone: Couldn't distill a skill from that session
skills.giftHint: Gift this skill to another companion (they get a copy).

secrets.title: Browser credentials
secrets.hint: Stored credentials this companion's browser can inject by reference. The value is encrypted on this machine and never shown again or sent to the model — only injected when the page's domain matches the allowed origins. The allowed origins also limit which domains the browser may send data to.
secrets.valueWriteOnly: Write-only: encrypted on this device, never shown again or sent to the model.
secrets.originsHint: One per line or comma-separated. Reduced to registrable domains. The credential is only injected on these domains, which also become the browser's egress allowlist.
secrets.originsRequired: At least one allowed origin is required.

companions.empty: No companions yet — create your first one!

overview.modelMissing: No chat model configured for {{companionName}} yet — it can't learn or chat.
overview.collectOff: All data collection is off, so {{companionName}} has nothing to learn from.
overview.diaryEmpty: No diary entries yet — come back after {{companionName}}'s first learning run!

memories.editHint: Edits apply to new conversations and live recall; an already-open chat keeps the memory snapshot it started with.
memories.addPlaceholder: Tell nomi something it should remember…
memories.empty: No memories yet. Enable collection and run learning, or add one manually.

collect.intro: Choose what your companions may learn from. Nothing is collected by default; enabled sources are written to the local companion/nomi/ directory and can be wiped anytime.
collect.clearConfirm: This deletes everything under companion/nomi/events. Learned memories are unaffected. Continue?
collect.clearHint: Deletes raw event files only; learned memories stay.
collect.disableAllConfirm: Stop all collection, learning and evolution? Learned skills and memories are kept, model config is unchanged, and you can re-enable anytime.

tool_calls.name: Tool calls
tool_calls.desc: Which tools were called in work sessions (tool name + param shape only, never values)

chat_user_messages.name: Chat prompts
chat_user_messages.desc: The questions you send in conversations

requirements.name: Requirements
requirements.desc: Titles, descriptions and tags of requirements you create

disclosure.title: Let your companion learn you
disclosure.body: Once on, your companion learns from how you use the platform (tool calls, tasks, chats) and distills skills and memories automatically. All data stays local — view, clear, or turn it all off anytime under Data Sources.
disclosure.enabled: Enabled — your companion will learn from your usage

evolve.title: Skill evolution
evolve.hint: Distills skills from your repeated multi-step actions, using the shared learning model above.
evolve.reflectHint: Also reflect after a complex task whether it's worth saving
evolve.autoActivateHint: Strongly-repeated high-confidence skills activate directly (still revocable in the Skills tab)

learn.modelHint: All companions share this model for scheduled learning

suggestions.empty: No suggestions yet — nomi will speak up once it has learned more.

chat.modelConfigHint: This companion's chat model. Applies everywhere (local chat and remote connections); switching updates all its sessions.
chat.modelMissing: Configure a chat model for this companion first
chat.clearContextHint: Clears this session only; memories are kept
chat.clearContextConfirmBody: This wipes all messages in this session (memories are kept). Continue?
chat.empty: Your private session with this companion — say hi
chat.clearConfirm: Clear all chat history and the rolling summary?

settings.name: Name
settings.nameHint: What your companion is called — shown in chat and on the desktop companion
settings.personaCustomPlaceholder: Extra persona notes (optional), e.g. call me "Captain"
settings.companionEnabledHint: Show your companion on the desktop (transparent always-on-top window, desktop only)
settings.quietHoursHint: No bubbles during this window — only the unread badge accrues
settings.characterHint: Pick who lives on your desktop — hover a card to preview its excited state
settings.knowledgeHint: Mount knowledge bases for {{companionName}} to consult and write back during chat
settings.remoteHint: Connect IM channels and decide whether {{companionName}} answers them — credentials, pairing approvals and channel status all live here
settings.remoteCreateBot: Connect a bot for this companion
settings.remoteBindConfirm: After binding, this bot is answered by {{companionName}} and the channel's active sessions are reset.
settings.remoteUnbindConfirm: After unbinding, this bot is no longer answered by any companion and the channel's active sessions are reset.
settings.remoteDeleteConfirm: Delete this bot? Its connection stops, the channel's sessions are cleared and the configuration is removed.
settings.remoteOtherBots: {{num}} bot(s) already answered by other companions: {{companions}}
settings.remoteUnboundBot: A bot without a bound companion already exists
settings.remoteBindSuccess: Now answered by {{companionName}} — sessions on this channel were reset
settings.remoteUnbindSuccess: Unbound — sessions on this channel were reset
settings.remoteBindFailed: Failed to save the greeter setting
settings.remoteEnableChannelHint: Start or stop this channel's bot connection
settings.deleteCompanionHint: Deletes {{companionName}}'s persona, look and chat threads; shared memories are kept
settings.deleteConfirmBody: Delete "{{companionName}}"? Its chat threads will be removed too; shared memories are kept.

companion.chatError: Oops… I zoned out. Say that again?

err.auth: Something's off with the model key or account — check the provider settings.
err.model: The model or endpoint config looks wrong — check the settings.
err.network: Can't reach the model service — check your network and retry.
err.rateLimited: Too many requests — give it a moment and try again.
err.timeout: The model timed out — try once more.
err.gateway: The model gateway hit an error — try again shortly.
err.contextTooLarge: This chat got too long for the model — start a fresh topic.
err.empty: The model returned nothing — say it once more.

companion.needsConfirm: Action needs confirmation — open the chat tab

customFigure.cardHint: Upload an image to make your own companion
customFigure.dropHint: Click to choose or drop an image here (JPG / PNG / WebP / GIF)
customFigure.pasteHint: You can also paste an image with Ctrl/Cmd+V
customFigure.copyrightHint: Make sure you have the rights to use this image; do not upload infringing content
customFigure.errTooLarge: File too large — please compress it and retry
customFigure.errMatteFailed: Couldn't separate the background: try a simpler background or a transparent image, tweak the tolerance and re-cut, or use the original
customFigure.modelUnavailable: AI cutout model unavailable; using quick cutout. You can also use the original image.
customFigure.narrowWarn: The image is very tall and narrow — consider cropping it first
customFigure.frameHint: Drag / resize the box around the head and shoulders; the right side shows the small-size preview
customFigure.libraryEmpty: No custom figures yet — tap “New / import” to start
customFigure.homeEntryHint: Upload an image to make a reusable companion figure
customFigure.inUseCannotDelete: This figure is in use by a companion and can't be deleted

migrate.memoryDesc: Export the shared memory hub as a .zip bundle; import it on another device to merge memories.
migrate.companionDesc: Export one companion's persona, look and settings, with the names of its bound knowledge bases attached.
migrate.importDesc: Pick a .zip bundle to import: memory bundles merge with de-duplication, companion bundles create a new companion, knowledge bundles create a new base.
migrate.unmatchedTitle: These knowledge bases were not found locally — import their bundles first, then bind manually:
migrate.desktopOnly: Migration is only available in the desktop app
